name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Orlando, FL: Value Pawn & Jewelry at S Orange Blossom Trail offers fast pawn loans on jewelry, watches, and collectibles.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry is located at 2105 S Orange Blossom Trail in Orlando, FL, operating as a standalone pawn shop. The store is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, Saturday from 9 AM to 6 PM, and closed on Sundays. Customers visit this Orlando location to access quick cash loans or browse a rotating selection of jewelry, watches, electronics, and collectibles.

The Orlando branch of Value Pawn & Jewelry provides fast pawn loans, jewelry buying services, and resale of quality used items. Whether you're looking to pawn an item or sell merchandise outright, the staff at this S Orange Blossom Trail location can provide an estimate over the phone or in person. Contact the store at 407-650-0228 to discuss your specific needs or hours before visiting.

When visiting Value Pawn & Jewelry in Orlando, bring a valid ID and the item(s) you want to pawn or sell. The process is straightforward—staff will assess the condition and provide a competitive offer on the spot. This S Orange Blossom Trail shop has built a reputation for fair dealing with Orlando customers seeking quick and convenient pawn services.
address: 2105 S Orange Blossom Trl, Orlando, FL 32805

company_info.headquarters: 2105 S Orange Blossom Trl, Orlando, FL 32805

pros: Open 7 days a week including Sundays (12pm–5pm), with weekday hours until 7pm
Instant Quote tool lets customers estimate electronics value online before visiting
EZ+ Rewards Program earns points on pawn, redeem, sell, and purchase transactions with online account management
Expert gold buyers test all precious metals on-site for accurate, fair pricing
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down and monthly payments
Take Today third-party financing option allows up to 12 months of payments on purchases
Online shop with daily new arrivals and thousands of pre-owned items available remotely
cons: Pawn loan fees and interest rates are not disclosed on the website — must ask in store
Take Today financing requires credit eligibility and is not guaranteed for all customers
Online payment management is unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania
Not all listed services are available in all areas — specific local limitations not detailed online
All retail merchandise is pre-owned; no new products sold
best_for: Miami residents needing immediate cash without a credit check by leveraging personal valuables
Bargain hunters seeking brand-name electronics, jewelry, or tools at 25–70% below retail
Gold and jewelry sellers wanting professional on-site metal testing and same-day payment
Budget shoppers who want layaway or installment purchase options without traditional financing
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best suited for Miami-area consumers who need fast, no-credit-check cash by pawning valuables, or who want deeply discounted pre-owned merchandise with flexible payment options. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs — fees and effective APR — are not published online and typically run very high, so borrowers should request full cost disclosure before agreeing to any loan transaction.
services: Gold and diamond jewelry buying (including broken/scrap gold)
Pre-owned retail merchandise sales (electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming, musical gear)
Online shop with daily new inventory
Instant Quote tool for electronics (online, no store visit required)
EZ+ Rewards Program with points and online pawn/layaway management
Take Today third-party purchase financing (up to 12+ months, credit-based)
Jewelry VIP Protection Program (guaranteed loan amounts, free stone replacement, free cleaning)
Product Protection Plan for electronics and audio/video equipment
